## ✅ E2E Test Setup Complete — MAIY Tech Hub

### Files Created

|------|---------|
| `tests/e2e/home.spec.ts` | Home page tests: title, hero section, nav links, dark mode toggle |

### Packages Installed
- `@playwright/test@1.59.1` (with `playwright@1.59.1` + `playwright-core@1.59.1`)
- Chromium 147 browser + FFmpeg (system deps installed via `--with-deps`)

### To Run Tests
```bash
cd /root/.openclaw/workspaces2/v4-ecosystem-review/maiy-tech-hub
```
